slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '아기 입술·손톱 색깔' white bold, '응급 vs 정상 기준' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: 'AAP 가이드라인 기준 · 산소포화도 선별검사'. LARGE prominent line illustration baby face close-up showing lips and tiny hand with nails, white outline on dark background, clean minimal strokes. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 011'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '청색증이란 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '혈액 산소포화도가 낮아져' white, '피부·입술·손톱이 푸르게' red #E63946. Center: LARGE line illustration showing bluish discoloration on baby lips and fingernails, white outline with red glow effect, minimal clean strokes. Below illustration: dark card #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding, white text COMPACT: '정상 산소포화도 95% 이상 (신생아 기준)'. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '정상 말초성 청색증 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '손발에만 푸른빛' white, '신생아 정상 소견' mint #2EC4B6. Center: SMALL line illustration icon baby hands and feet with slight blue tint, white outline mint glow. Two rows stacked GENEROUS spacing: Row 1: SMALL icon checkmark mint left + COMPACT white text right '생후 첫 며칠 내 자연 소실'. Row 2: SMALL icon checkmark mint left + COMPACT white text right '차가울 때 일시적 재발 가능'. Mint outlined box around rows comfortable padding. Bottom mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '중심성 청색증 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '입술·혀·몸통 중심부' white, '절대 정상 아님' red #E63946. Center: LARGE line illustration baby face showing blue lips and tongue, white outline with red warning glow, clean strokes. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '관찰 방법 ✓'. Large red rounded border around all items comfortable padding. Bottom red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '일시적 정상 ✓'. Row 3: SMALL icon crying mint left + COMPACT white text right '심하게 운 직후'. Row 4: SMALL icon arrow mint left + COMPACT white text right '보온·마사지로 회복 안 되면 병원'. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고' white, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 with thin mint underline. No quotes.

common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
